title: CTOV - Rats Compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and Rats mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Rats. You will find garbage heaps in villages. 1.20+ datapack is for Forge. 

**Rats mod**

Rats can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rats)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
